items.title: Good but one bad thing
items.summary: Loving this game reminds me of alchemy stars and ark nights with the characters and UI and I’m game models for fighting screams reverse 1999 but the gameplay is a cool spin involving rogue lite elements, my only complaint which you yourselfs have confirmed is the use of AI for the translations, it’s 90% there but I do see flaws such as chapter one the AI doing the text can’t decide if Jenkins is a boy or girl, and a few other text errors, I’m hoping when this game has more funding you all can get someone to review the in game dialogue to basically spell check everything.
items.author: Doggy yet
